narrative:
Precinct Monroe Twp & Pitsburg Village (precinct in Darke County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.6 percentage points.
